bead.title: evidence: shared caps + clamping primitives + config (Stage A1)
bead.description:
Stage A1 of FEAT-022. Lands the shared cli/internal/evidence package
and the evidence-caps config section. Ships with permissive default
caps so no existing behavior changes on land. Blocks all subsequent
FEAT-022 stages.

Implements FEAT-022 requirements §1 and §1a.

In-scope files:
- cli/internal/evidence/ (new package): caps.go, read.go, clamp.go,
  sections.go, diff.go, strategy.go, marker.go (with _test.go siblings).
  Exports capabilities enumerated in FEAT-022 §1; concrete Go
  identifiers finalized during implementation.
- cli/internal/config/schema/config.schema.json: add evidence_caps
  section with per-harness override precedence.
- cli/internal/config/ config struct extension for evidence_caps.

Out-of-scope (do NOT touch):
- The structural sink lint rule — separate bead (Stage A2).
- Any existing prompt-building call site. Those migrate in Stages B–E.

Concrete defaults shipped (permissive on purpose — Stage F telemetry
informs tuning):
- MaxPromptBytes = 4 MiB
- MaxInlinedFileBytes = 512 KiB
- MaxDiffBytes = 2 MiB
- MaxGoverningDocBytes = 256 KiB

Pinned contracts (so downstream stages can consume without drift):
- `EvidenceAssemblySection` struct shape for telemetry (consumed by
  Stages C1, C2, F): { name: string, bytes_included: int,
  bytes_omitted: int, truncation_reason: string,
  selected_items: []string, omitted_items: []string }
- `TruncationMarker` canonical string: exported constant; downstream
  parsers check equality against this constant.
- Pre-dispatch-overflow outcome classes that Stages C1 and C2 emit:
  "review-error: context_overflow" (review), "compare-error:
  context_overflow" (grading). Stage G consumes the review class name.

Rollback: delete cli/internal/evidence/, revert config schema and
struct extensions. No existing behavior depends on this bead on land.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go build ./internal/evidence/... passes. cd cli && go test ./internal/evidence/... passes; every exported primitive has at least one behavioral test that asserts its contract. cd cli && go test ./internal/config/... passes with a new test that sets per-harness overrides in .ddx/config.yaml and verifies evidence_caps resolution. grep -rE 'os\.ReadFile|ioutil\.ReadFile' cli/internal/evidence/ returns matches ONLY inside the body of ReadFileClamped. EvidenceAssemblySection struct and TruncationMarker constant exist as exported symbols: cd cli && go doc ./internal/evidence EvidenceAssemblySection TruncationMarker returns non-empty. Prose acceptance: cli/internal/evidence/ is self-contained and importable from cli/cmd/, cli/internal/agent/, and cli/internal/server/ without import cycles.
